sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 4

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 4:1
items.html: The name Kadma'a [first] refers to the Zivug [coupling] made upon the lower one in the hall of its upper-upper. And with the Nukva [female] of ZA [Zeir Anpin], it indicates the Zivug made through the incorporation of ZON [Zeir Anpin and Nukva] in the Zivug of AVI [Aba ve Ima, Father and Mother] in the secret of MAN [Mayin Nukvin] to them. With this incorporation it is considered that the Nukva receives her Mochin there by means of ZA her husband, for she cannot receive from the upper-upper, which is Ima; rather, ZA is incorporated in Aba and the Nukva is incorporated in Ima, and in this way the Nukva is found receiving the Mochin from AVI — yet by means of ZA, for she cannot receive any Light whatsoever except through ZA. Therefore, on the one hand it is considered that ZA gives her, in a Zivug Panim be Panim [face-to-face], the Kli [vessel] that raises MAN, and the Rucha Kadma'a [first spirit] — this being because they are clothed in the Panim be Panim of AVI themselves. Yet on the other hand, ZA does not come into account at all in this Zivug, since he is only in the discernment of a conveyor of those Lights to the Nukva and received nothing of them for his own need. For he does not need them — he already has all this Gadlut from before that raising of MAN, and he did not rise now with the Nukva for MAN for his own sake, but to be in the discernment of a conveyor of the Lights to the Nukva. Therefore all the ascent and the Mochin that emerged here are named after the Nukva alone, to the point that it is said she receives these Mochin not through ZA — that is, ZA does not come into account here. Understand this well, and remember it.

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 4:2
items.html: And since this is so, we are engaged here with the Nukva alone, for by means of ZA, AVI are regarded as an actual upper one to the Nukva, until she can receive the Mochin of Gadlut from Ima herself, in the above manner. Accordingly, in the AHP [Awzen, Hotem, Peh] of the Nukva, which are now incorporated in AVI at the time of the Zivug, the GE [Galgalta ve Eynaim] of her lower one are found cleaving — namely the GE of the souls of the righteous. The level of the Zivug of the Nukva's Mochin of Gadlut emerged also upon the added MAN of the GE of the souls of the righteous, for whom that Zivug is regarded as in the discernment of upper-upper; they have now received the first Zivug upon their MAN. And the Nukva takes the level of their Zivug, in the secret of the birthright, taking a double portion — namely her own share, which is her Mochin of Gadlut, and the share of the souls — because in the first Zivug the MAN of the souls of the righteous can receive no form. And this level, the share of the souls of the righteous that the Nukva took, is what is called Rucha Kadma'a de Shadi Bah Ba'alah beZivuga Kadma'a [the first spirit that her husband casts into her in the first coupling]; it is also called "first MAN," since this level emerged upon the MAN of the souls of the righteous for the first time. And although they cannot receive it, they nevertheless profit very much through that first Zivug. First, the Nukva receives that whole level on their behalf, and afterwards, when she comes to her place, she couples upon their MAN and distributes to the souls, little by little, the aforesaid level she took on their behalf, called Rucha Kadma'a, until she pays them all the discernments included in that level — thus all the gain is theirs. Second, there is no absence in the spiritual; and that level of Zivug that emerged upon their MAN in AVI — although the Nukva took it in its fullness, as said — is still considered to remain in its fullness in AVI themselves, in the secret of the first MAN that never depart from there and are never missing from there, as above (p. 739, Item 8), in the secret of firstborn sons.

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 4:3
items.html: And you find that all these names — Bi'a Kadma'a [first coming], Kli Kadma'a [first vessel], Rucha Kadma'a [first spirit], and first MAN in the discernment of firstborn sons that are never missing from there; and the first Zivug upon the MAN in the discernment of "without form"; and the matter of the double portion that the firstborn takes; and the discernment of the Nesira [sawing apart] of ZON; and the Mochin of the side of Binot and Gevurot that enter the Nukva together with the Nukva's Mochin of Gadlut — all these discernments emerged together, in one place, in one Zivug: namely, in the hall of AVI.

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 4:4
items.html: (to the question) For the raising of MAN and the Mochin that emerged in the hall of AVI, which the Nukva received by means of ZA, Panim be Panim, as above — they are the Bi'a Kadma'a [first coming] of ZA, that is, at the time of his incorporation in Aba himself, as above. And in truth there are two Zivugim here: one for the completion of the Kelim [vessels], and the second for the attainment of the Lights; yet both are considered as one, as is known. It follows that first the Nukva received the Kli that raises MAN, and afterwards she received the Mochin themselves, with the share of the GE of the souls, called Rucha Kadma'a, as above. And in relation to the MAN of the GE of the souls, this is considered for them the first Zivug upon their MAN, as above. They are also considered first MAN remaining in AVI, in the secret of firstborn sons, never departing from there — for even though the Rucha Kadma'a afterwards descended with the Nukva to her place, the Rucha nevertheless remained also in AVI, in the discernment of firstborn sons, as above. It is also known that when the Nukva attained the Kli that raises MAN — namely her AHP, through the drop of the Zivug of Aba, which lowered the Hey Tachtona [lower Hey] from her Eynaim [eyes], and her Achoraim [posterior] returned to their degree as at first — with this the Nesira [sawing apart] was made, for she attained her own AHP, which are Achoraim, and a complete wall of the Nukva of the discernment of GAR, and she no longer needs the wall of ZA, and she is sawn apart from him. Then her level also became equal to ZA, for she has Achoraim of the discernment of Gadlut, and ten Kelim like ZA — but at the back of ZA, for she had not yet received the Lights. And when she receives the Lights in the hall of AVI, she then attains her Mochin as well; but the whole time she is in AVI, they are not considered Panim be Panim there, since she is there only in the secret of incorporation, and this is not a complete clothing of the Lights. Only afterwards, when she descends from there to her place below, can she return Panim be Panim with ZA. And you see how all the many matters above emerged almost at once, in one place and in one Zivug. Remember this well, for it is on this account that all the above matters are titled Kadma'a [first], or "first time," and the like.
